StopRule: Frozen retrospective discovery only. Center must be positive and no worse than control in both 2015-2018 and 2019-2020, improve continuous net by at least 3% and CAGR by 0.05 point, meet or exceed control PF/recovery/return-DD, retain at least 98% of trades, keep DD <=1.20% and <=control+0.10 point, and receive at least three of six neighbor passes. Failure closes the family without opening post-2020 data.
